name: 妖魔
base_prompt: terrifying demon beast, multiple red glowing eyes, twisted black horns, muscular dark body, jagged teeth, smoke and embers

variants.lurking: half-hidden in shadow, only eyes visible, smoke tendrils
variants.attacking: leaping forward, claws extended, mouth agape, fire breath
variants.defeated: crumbling to ash, dissolving, fading roar, black smoke
variants.transformed: disguised as human, subtle demonic features, unsettling smile

negative_base: cute, friendly, bright, cartoon, deformed, human skin
